items.title: Rebel Wilson cleared in defamation case brought by actress in her own film
items.dek: Wilson was accused of defaming young Australian actress Charlotte MacInnes, but cleared by a Sydney court.
items.body: Wilson was accused of defaming young Australian actress Charlotte MacInnes, but cleared by a Sydney court.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Meet the women breaking world records in lumberjack sports
items.dek: The BBC finds out what is driving the sports' increasing popularity with women and what it takes to be the best.
items.body: The BBC finds out what is driving the sports' increasing popularity with women and what it takes to be the best.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: France passes law banning under-15s from social media
items.dek: The law will require social media platforms in France to verify all users age from January.
items.body: The law will require social media platforms in France to verify all users age from January.
items.author: IriLine Desk
